title: No information about signed types in --json-only type table
body:
When using the --json-only feature of verilator, there is no information about whether a port is signed or unsigned. For example, here is what I see in the json type table when I run

`verilator --json-only SignedModel.sv`

on this module:
```
module SignedModel (
    input  logic signed [31:0] signed_port,
    input  logic [31:0] unsigned_port
);

endmodule
```

Type Table:
```
{"type":"TYPETABLE","name":"","addr":"(C)","loc":"a,0:0,0:0","constraintRefp":"UNLINKED","emptyQueuep":"UNLINKED","queueIndexp":"UNLINKED","streamp":"UNLINKED","voidp":"(J)",
   "typesp": [
    {"type":"VOIDDTYPE","name":"","addr":"(J)","loc":"d,56:17,56:26","dtypep":"(J)","generic":false},
    {"type":"BASICDTYPE","name":"logic","addr":"(G)","loc":"e,2:12,2:17","dtypep":"(G)","keyword":"logic","range":"31:0","generic":true,"rangep": []},
    {"type":"BASICDTYPE","name":"logic","addr":"(I)","loc":"e,3:12,3:17","dtypep":"(I)","keyword":"logic","range":"31:0","generic":true,"rangep": []}
  ]},
```

It creates two distinct types in the table, but provides no information about if the type is signed.

In the --xml-only output's type table, there is a field if a port is signed.

```
<typetable loc="a,0,0,0,0">
  <voiddtype loc="d,56,17,56,26" id="3"/>
  <basicdtype loc="e,2,12,2,17" id="1" name="logic" left="31" right="0" signed="true"/>
  <basicdtype loc="e,3,12,3,17" id="2" name="logic" left="31" right="0"/>
</typetable>
```

Since the --xml-only option is shown as deprecated, it would be helpful if the --json-only output could show this information too.

[VSignedModel.tree.json](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/24274375/VSignedModel.tree.json)
[VSignedModel.tree.meta.json](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/24274377/VSignedModel.tree.meta.json)
[VSignedModel.xml](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/24274376/VSignedModel.xml)
code_blocks:
module SignedModel (
    input  logic signed [31:0] signed_port,
    input  logic [31:0] unsigned_port
);

endmodule
{"type":"TYPETABLE","name":"","addr":"(C)","loc":"a,0:0,0:0","constraintRefp":"UNLINKED","emptyQueuep":"UNLINKED","queueIndexp":"UNLINKED","streamp":"UNLINKED","voidp":"(J)",
   "typesp": [
    {"type":"VOIDDTYPE","name":"","addr":"(J)","loc":"d,56:17,56:26","dtypep":"(J)","generic":false},
    {"type":"BASICDTYPE","name":"logic","addr":"(G)","loc":"e,2:12,2:17","dtypep":"(G)","keyword":"logic","range":"31:0","generic":true,"rangep": []},
    {"type":"BASICDTYPE","name":"logic","addr":"(I)","loc":"e,3:12,3:17","dtypep":"(I)","keyword":"logic","range":"31:0","generic":true,"rangep": []}
  ]},
<typetable loc="a,0,0,0,0">
  <voiddtype loc="d,56,17,56,26" id="3"/>
  <basicdtype loc="e,2,12,2,17" id="1" name="logic" left="31" right="0" signed="true"/>
  <basicdtype loc="e,3,12,3,17" id="2" name="logic" left="31" right="0"/>
</typetable>
